top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Lipikhina Sees Earnings Supercycle Driving US Stocks
top_signals.summary: An earnings “supercycle” in the US is poised to drive stocks to more record highs, according to Nataliia Lipikhina at JPMorgan Chase & Co., fueled by heavy spending from hyperscalers and advances in agentic AI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's crash to $65K triggers $1.8B in crypto liquidations
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin's drop to $65,000 triggered over $1.8 billion in crypto liquidations as traders brace for a test of $60,000 as support.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin has hit 'max fear' below $67K as analysis sees BTC price rebound
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin sparked two-month lows in the Crypto Fear & Greed Index while analysis predicted a "catch-up" with record highs in stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: KKR, Ares, Blackstone tumble premarket as Partners Group caps private equity fund withdrawals
top_signals.summary: U.S. private markets firms fell in premarket trading, as concerns over redemption pressure returned to the spotlight.

top_signals.title: DOJ, CFTC probe George Santos over Kalshi trades tied to State of the Union appearance: report
top_signals.summary: DOJ and CFTC are investigating George Santos after Kalshi flagged trades where he allegedly bet against his own State of the Union attendance.

top_signals.title: 2026 Spring Semester Package presents a roadmap for advancing economic resilience and social cohesion across the EU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 03 Jun 2026 Today, the Commission adopted the 2026 European Semester Spring Package.
